# Tests that must NOT appear for ButtonModifier (unrelated components)
# These tests exist in XTS but test unrelated areas.
# If any of these appear in the output it indicates over-selection.
#
# Format: one XTS project path fragment per line (non-comment lines)
# Matching: substring match against output project paths

# Navigation-only suites - ButtonModifier doesn't affect navigation
ace_ets_component_navigation

# Rich editor suites - ButtonModifier doesn't affect rich text
ace_ets_component_richtext

# Video component suites
ace_ets_component_video
